headline: How The Workday (WDAY) Story Is Shifting Toward AI Investment And Slower Growth Expectations
summary: Workday’s revised fair value estimate shifts slightly, with the price target moving from US$184.73 to US$181.31. That subtle reset lines up with Street commentary that balances trimmed expectations with ongoing debate around growth, margins and how much weight to put on AI and leadership changes. As you read on, you will see how to interpret these updates and track the evolving Workday story in your own research process. Analyst Price Targets don't always capture the full story.
